# Elara Voss — Senior Frontend Engineer & Design Systems Architect

> Personal portfolio and technical blog of Elara Voss, a senior frontend engineer and design systems architect based in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

## About

Elara Voss is a Senior Frontend Engineer with 8 years of professional experience, specialising in Astro, React, TypeScript, design system architecture, and web performance engineering. She holds a BSc in Computer Science from TU Delft (2018) and is based in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

She is the lead architect of Meridian — a design system powering 12 products across a fintech company — and is known for her work on Core Web Vitals optimisation and high-performance frontend builds.

## Services

Elara offers the following professional services to product teams, startups, and agencies:

- **Frontend Development** — Bespoke Astro/React builds, performance-first, accessible by default. From €8,000/project.
- **Design Systems Architecture** — Token strategy, component library, Storybook, adoption playbook. From €12,000/engagement.
- **Performance Consulting** — Core Web Vitals audit, LCP/CLS/INP root cause analysis, fix plan, and optional implementation. From €2,500/audit.

## Blog

Technical articles covering:

- Web performance and Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP)
- Design systems architecture and design tokens
- Astro framework — patterns, migration, island architecture
- React — component API design, state management, performance
- TypeScript — practical patterns for frontend engineering
- Frontend accessibility and WCAG compliance

## Contact & Social

- Website: https://elaravoss.dev/
- Email: hello@elaravoss.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/elaravoss
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/elaravoss
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/elaravoss

## Technical Stack

This site is built with Astro 6, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, and zero client-side JavaScript. It achieves a 100/100 Lighthouse Performance score.
